member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef
member.summary: Lightweight type reference with category and interface flag. Used for parameter types and return types in capabilities.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef.TypeId
member.summary: Gets or sets the ATS type ID (e.g., "string", "Aspire.Hosting/RedisResource").

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef.ClrType
member.summary: Gets or sets the CLR type reference for direct type access.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef.Category
member.summary: Gets or sets the type category (Primitive, Handle, Dto, Callback, Array, List, Dict, Unknown). Note: This is mutable to allow Pass 2 resolution of Unknown types to Handle.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef.IsInterface
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this is an interface type. Only meaningful for Handle category types.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef.ElementType
member.summary: Gets or sets the element type reference for Array/List types.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef.KeyType
member.summary: Gets or sets the key type reference for Dict types.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef.ValueType
member.summary: Gets or sets the value type reference for Dict types.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef.IsReadOnly
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this is a readonly collection (copied, not a handle). Only meaningful for Array/Dict categories.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef.IsResourceBuilder
member.summary: Gets whether this type represents a resource builder target type. Computed from ClrType - true for types that implement the Aspire resource contract.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef.IsDistributedApplicationBuilder
member.summary: Gets whether this type is IDistributedApplicationBuilder.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef.IsDistributedApplication
member.summary: Gets whether this type is DistributedApplication.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef.UnionTypes
member.summary: Gets or sets the member types for Union category. When Category = Union, this contains the alternative types.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDiagnosticSeverity
member.summary: Represents the severity of an ATS scanner diagnostic.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDiagnosticSeverity.Info
member.summary: Information - verbose details about scanning (shown with --debug).

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDiagnosticSeverity.Warning
member.summary: Warning - the item was skipped but scanning continues.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDiagnosticSeverity.Error
member.summary: Error - a type validation error (e.g., object type without [AspireUnion]).

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDiagnostic
member.summary: Represents a diagnostic message from the ATS capability scanner.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDiagnostic.Severity
member.summary: Gets the severity of the diagnostic.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDiagnostic.Message
member.summary: Gets the diagnostic message.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDiagnostic.Location
member.summary: Gets the source location (e.g., type name, method name).

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDiagnostic.Error(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an error diagnostic.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDiagnostic.Warning(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a warning diagnostic.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDiagnostic.Info(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an info diagnostic (verbose output shown with --debug).

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo
member.summary: Represents a discovered [AspireExport] capability.

remarks.para: This model is shared between code generation (using RoMethod/RoType metadata reflection) and the runtime CapabilityDispatcher (using System.Reflection).
The capability represents a single exportable method that can be invoked via invokeCapability(capabilityId, args) from polyglot clients.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.CapabilityId
member.summary: Gets or sets the capability ID (e.g., "Aspire.Hosting/addRedis").

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.MethodName
member.summary: Gets or sets the simple method name for generated SDKs (e.g., "addRedis", "isRunMode"). For context type capabilities, this is just the property/method name without the type prefix.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.OwningTypeName
member.summary: Gets or sets the owning type name for property/method capabilities.
member.remarks: For PropertyGetter, PropertySetter, and InstanceMethod capabilities, this is the type name that owns the property/method (e.g., "ExecutionContext"). For regular Method capabilities, this is null.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.QualifiedMethodName
member.summary: Gets the qualified method name combining OwningTypeName and MethodName.
member.remarks: Returns "ExecutionContext.isRunMode" for property capabilities, or just "addRedis" for regular method capabilities.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description of what this capability does.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.Parameters
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameters for this capability.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.ReturnType
member.summary: Gets or sets the return type reference with full type metadata. Use TypeId for void return types.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.TargetTypeId
member.summary: Gets or sets the original (declared) ATS type ID that this capability targets. May be an interface type (e.g., "Aspire.Hosting/IResourceWithEnvironment").

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.TargetType
member.summary: Gets or sets the target type reference with full type metadata.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.TargetParameterName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the target parameter (e.g., "builder", "resource"). This is the first parameter of the method that represents the target/receiver.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.ExpandedTargetTypes
member.summary: Gets or sets the expanded list of concrete types this capability applies to. Pre-computed during scanning by resolving interface targets to all implementing types.
member.remarks: For flat codegen (Go, C): use this to put methods on each concrete builder. For inheritance codegen (TypeScript, Java): use instead.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.ReturnsBuilder
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the return type is a builder type.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.CapabilityKind
member.summary: Gets or sets the kind of capability (Method, PropertyGetter, PropertySetter, InstanceMethod).

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.SourceLocation
member.summary: Gets or sets the source location where this capability is defined.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo.RunSyncOnBackgroundThread
member.summary: Gets or sets whether synchronous invocations of this capability should run on a background thread.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo
member.summary: Represents a parameter in an ATS capability.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameter name.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the type reference with full type metadata.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo.IsOptional
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this parameter is optional.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo.IsNullable
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this parameter is nullable.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo.IsCallback
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this parameter is a callback delegate. Callbacks are inferred from delegate types (Func, Action, custom delegates).

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo.CallbackParameters
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameters of the callback delegate. Only populated when is true.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo.CallbackReturnType
member.summary: Gets or sets the return type for the callback delegate. Only populated when is true.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo.DefaultValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the default value for optional parameters.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCallbackParameterInfo
member.summary: Represents a parameter in a callback delegate signature.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCallbackParameterInfo.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameter name.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCallbackParameterInfo.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the type reference for this parameter.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeInfo
member.summary: Represents type information discovered from [AspireExport(AtsTypeId = "...")].

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeInfo.AtsTypeId
member.summary: Gets or sets the ATS type ID.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeInfo.ClrType
member.summary: Gets or sets the CLR type reference for direct type access.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeInfo.IsInterface
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this type is an interface.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeInfo.ImplementedInterfaces
member.summary: Gets or sets the interfaces this type implements. Only populated for concrete (non-interface) types.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeInfo.BaseTypeHierarchy
member.summary: Gets or sets the base type hierarchy (from immediate base up to Resource/Object). Only populated for concrete (non-interface) types. Used for expanding capabilities targeting base types to derived types.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeInfo.HasExposeProperties
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this type has [AspireExport(ExposeProperties = true)]. Types with this flag will have their properties exposed as capabilities.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeInfo.HasExposeMethods
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this type has [AspireExport(ExposeMethods = true)]. Types with this flag will have their methods exposed as capabilities.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeInfo.IsResourceBuilder
member.summary: Gets whether this handle type represents an Aspire resource type.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDtoTypeInfo
member.summary: Represents a DTO type discovered from [AspireDto] attributes. Used for generating TypeScript interfaces for DTOs.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDtoTypeInfo.TypeId
member.summary: Gets or sets the ATS type ID for this DTO.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDtoTypeInfo.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the simple type name (for interface name generation).

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDtoTypeInfo.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets a description of this DTO type.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDtoTypeInfo.ClrType
member.summary: Gets or sets the CLR type reference for direct type access.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDtoTypeInfo.Properties
member.summary: Gets or sets the properties of this DTO.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDtoPropertyInfo
member.summary: Represents a property of a DTO type.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDtoPropertyInfo.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the property name.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDtoPropertyInfo.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the property type reference.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDtoPropertyInfo.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets a description of this property.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDtoPropertyInfo.IsOptional
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this property is optional (nullable or has default).

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsEnumTypeInfo
member.summary: Represents an enum type discovered during scanning. Used for generating TypeScript enums.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsEnumTypeInfo.TypeId
member.summary: Gets or sets the ATS type ID for this enum (e.g., "enum:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ContainerLifetime").

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsEnumTypeInfo.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the simple type name (for enum name generation).

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsEnumTypeInfo.ClrType
member.summary: Gets or sets the CLR type reference for direct type access.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsEnumTypeInfo.Values
member.summary: Gets or sets the enum member names.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeCategory
member.summary: Categories of ATS types for serialization and handling.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeCategory.Primitive
member.summary: Primitive types that serialize directly to JSON values. Examples: string, number, boolean, datetime, guid.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeCategory.Enum
member.summary: Enum types that serialize as string values.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeCategory.Handle
member.summary: Handle types that are opaque references to .NET objects. Serialized as { "$handle": "type:id", "$type": "type" }.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeCategory.Dto
member.summary: Data Transfer Objects that serialize as JSON objects. Must be marked with [AspireDto].

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeCategory.Callback
member.summary: Callback types (delegates) that are registered and invoked by ID.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeCategory.Array
member.summary: Readonly array/collection types that serialize as JSON arrays (copied). Examples: T[], IReadOnlyList<T>, IReadOnlyCollection<T>, IEnumerable<T>.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeCategory.List
member.summary: Mutable list types that are handles to .NET List<T>.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeCategory.Dict
member.summary: Dictionary types that serialize as JSON objects. Mutable dictionaries are handles; readonly dictionaries are copied.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeCategory.Union
member.summary: Union types that can hold one of multiple alternative types. Serialization depends on the member types.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeCategory.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown types that couldn't be resolved during the first pass of scanning. In Pass 2, these are either resolved to Handle (if the type is in the universe) or filtered out (if the type is not a valid ATS type).

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityKind
member.summary: Kinds of ATS capabilities for code generation.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityKind.Method
member.summary: Regular extension method capability.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityKind.PropertyGetter
member.summary: Property getter capability (from ExposeProperties=true).

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityKind.PropertySetter
member.summary: Property setter capability (from ExposeProperties=true).

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityKind.InstanceMethod
member.summary: Instance method capability (from ExposeMethods=true).

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants
member.summary: Constants for ATS (Aspire Type System) type IDs and capability IDs.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.AspireHostingAssembly
member.summary: The Aspire.Hosting assembly name.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.String
member.summary: String type ID. Maps from .NET .

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.Char
member.summary: Char type ID. Maps from .NET . Serializes to JSON string.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.Number
member.summary: Number type ID. Maps from .NET numeric types (int, long, float, double, decimal, etc.). Serializes to JSON number.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.Boolean
member.summary: Boolean type ID. Maps from .NET .

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.Void
member.summary: Void type ID. Represents no return value.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.DateTime
member.summary: DateTime type ID. Maps from .NET . Serializes to JSON string (ISO 8601).

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.DateTimeOffset
member.summary: DateTimeOffset type ID. Maps from .NET . Serializes to JSON string (ISO 8601).

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.DateOnly
member.summary: DateOnly type ID. Maps from .NET . Serializes to JSON string (YYYY-MM-DD).

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.TimeOnly
member.summary: TimeOnly type ID. Maps from .NET . Serializes to JSON string (HH:mm:ss).

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.TimeSpan
member.summary: TimeSpan type ID. Maps from .NET . Serializes to JSON number (total milliseconds).

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.Guid
member.summary: Guid type ID. Maps from .NET . Serializes to JSON string.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.Uri
member.summary: Uri type ID. Maps from .NET . Serializes to JSON string.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.Any
member.summary: Any type ID. Maps from .NET . Accepts any supported ATS type. Use when a parameter needs to accept multiple types without explicit union declaration.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.CancellationToken
member.summary: CancellationToken type ID. Maps from .NET . In TypeScript, maps to AbortSignal for cancellation support.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.EnumPrefix
member.summary: Enum type ID prefix. Maps from .NET enum types. Full format: "enum:{FullTypeName}". Serializes to JSON string (enum name).

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.BuilderTypeId
member.summary: Type ID for IDistributedApplicationBuilder.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.ApplicationTypeId
member.summary: Type ID for DistributedApplication.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.ReferenceExpressionTypeId
member.summary: Type ID for ReferenceExpression.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.CreateBuilderCapability
member.summary: Capability ID for creating a builder.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.BuildCapability
member.summary: Capability ID for building the application.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.RunCapability
member.summary: Capability ID for running the application.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.ArrayTypeId(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an array type ID for the given element type.
member.param: The element type ID.
member.returns: The array type ID.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.ListTypeId(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a List type ID for the given element type.
member.param: The element type ID.
member.returns: The List type ID.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.DictTypeId(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a Dict type ID for the given key and value types.
member.param: The key type ID.
The value type ID.
member.returns: The Dict type ID.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.EnumTypeId(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an enum type ID for the given enum type full name.
member.param: The full name of the enum type.
member.returns: The enum type ID.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.IsEnum(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a type ID represents an enum type.
member.param: The ATS type ID to check.
member.returns: True if the type is an enum.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.IsArray(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a type ID represents an array type.
member.param: The ATS type ID to check.
member.returns: True if the type is an array.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.IsList(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a type ID represents a List type.
member.param: The ATS type ID to check.
member.returns: True if the type is a List.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.IsDict(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a type ID represents a Dict type.
member.param: The ATS type ID to check.
member.returns: True if the type is a Dict.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.IsPrimitive(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a type ID represents a primitive type.
member.param: The ATS type ID to check.
member.returns: True if the type is a primitive.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.IsHandle(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a type ID represents a handle type (has Assembly/Type format).
member.param: The ATS type ID to check.
member.returns: True if the type is a handle.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.GetCategory(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the type category for a type ID. Note: This method cannot distinguish DTOs from Handles based on type ID alone. Use the scanner's type mapping to determine if a handle type is actually a DTO.
member.param: The ATS type ID.
True if this is a callback parameter.
member.returns: The type category.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.s_primitiveTypes
member.summary: Set of CLR types that map to ATS primitive types.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.IsPrimitiveType(System.Type)
member.summary: Checks if a CLR type is a primitive ATS type.
member.param: The CLR type to check.
member.returns: True if the type is a primitive.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.GetCategory(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the type category for a CLR type.
member.param: The CLR type.
member.returns: The type category.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.IsListType(System.Type)
member.summary: Checks if a type is a mutable List type.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.IsReadOnlyListType(System.Type)
member.summary: Checks if a type is a readonly list/collection type.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.IsDictType(System.Type)
member.summary: Checks if a type is a dictionary type.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsConstants.IsReadOnlyDictType(System.Type)
member.summary: Checks if a dictionary type is readonly.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsContext
member.summary: Contains all scanned types, capabilities, and metadata from ATS assembly scanning.

remarks.para: The ATS type system has three distinct categories of types, each with different serialization and code generation behavior:

item.description: Types marked with [AspireExport]. These are passed by reference using opaque handles. The TypeScript SDK generates wrapper classes that hold handles and proxy method calls back to .NET. Examples: IDistributedApplicationBuilder, ContainerResource, EndpointReference.

Types marked with [AspireDto]. These are serialized as JSON objects and passed by value. The TypeScript SDK generates interfaces matching the DTO's properties. Examples: CreateBuilderOptions, ResourceSnapshot.
Enum types discovered in capability signatures. These are serialized as strings. The TypeScript SDK generates TypeScript enums with string values.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsContext.Capabilities
member.summary: Gets the capabilities discovered during scanning. Capabilities are methods or properties marked with [AspireExport] that can be invoked via RPC.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsContext.HandleTypes
member.summary: Gets the handle types discovered during scanning. These are types marked with [AspireExport] that are passed by reference using opaque handles. Code generators create wrapper classes for these types.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsContext.DtoTypes
member.summary: Gets the DTO types discovered during scanning. These are types marked with [AspireDto] that are serialized as JSON objects. Code generators create interfaces for these types.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsContext.EnumTypes
member.summary: Gets the enum types discovered during scanning. These are enum types found in capability signatures, serialized as strings. Code generators create enum definitions for these types.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsContext.Diagnostics
member.summary: Gets any diagnostics (warnings/errors) generated during scanning.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsContext.Methods
member.summary: Runtime registry mapping capability IDs to methods.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsContext.Properties
member.summary: Runtime registry mapping capability IDs to properties.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsContext.GetCategory(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the type category for a CLR type based on scanned data. Used at runtime for marshalling.
member.param: The CLR type to classify.
member.returns: The type category.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeMapping
member.summary: Static utility for deriving ATS type IDs from CLR types.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeMapping.DeriveTypeId(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Derives an ATS type ID from an assembly name and full type name.
member.param: The assembly name.
The full type name including namespace.
member.returns: The derived type ID in format {AssemblyName}/{FullTypeName}.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeMapping.DeriveTypeId(System.Type)
member.summary: Derives an ATS type ID from a CLR type.
member.param: The CLR type.
member.returns: The derived type ID in format {AssemblyName}/{FullTypeName}.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AttributeDataReader
member.summary: Provides full-name-based discovery of ATS attributes from , so that third-party authors can define their own attribute types with the same full name without requiring a package reference to Aspire.Hosting.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AttributeDataReader.GetAspireExportData(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets from the specified , if present.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AttributeDataReader.GetAspireExportData(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Gets from the specified , if present.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AttributeDataReader.GetAspireExportData(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Gets from the specified , if present.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AttributeDataReader.GetAspireExportDataAll(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Gets all entries from the specified .

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AttributeDataReader.HasAspireExportIgnoreData(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified has the AspireExportIgnore attribute.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AttributeDataReader.HasAspireExportIgnoreData(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified has the AspireExportIgnore attribute.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AttributeDataReader.HasAspireExportIgnoreData(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified has the AspireExportIgnore attribute.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AttributeDataReader.HasAspireDtoData(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified has the AspireDto attribute.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AttributeDataReader.GetAspireUnionData(System.Reflection.ParameterInfo)
member.summary: Gets from the specified , if present.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.AttributeDataReader.GetAspireUnionData(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Gets from the specified , if present.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AspireExportData
member.summary: Name-based adapter for [AspireExport] attribute data, parsed from .

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AspireExportData.Id
member.summary: Gets the method name / capability id from the constructor argument.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AspireExportData.Type
member.summary: Gets the CLR type for assembly-level type exports.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AspireExportData.Description
member.summary: Gets a description of what this export does.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AspireExportData.MethodName
member.summary: Gets the method name override for generated polyglot SDKs.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AspireExportData.ExposeProperties
member.summary: Gets whether to expose properties of this type as ATS capabilities.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AspireExportData.ExposeMethods
member.summary: Gets whether to expose public instance methods of this type as ATS capabilities.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AspireExportData.RunSyncOnBackgroundThread
member.summary: Gets whether synchronous exported methods should be invoked on a background thread by the ATS dispatcher.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.AspireUnionData
member.summary: Name-based adapter for [AspireUnion] attribute data, parsed from .

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.AspireUnionData.Types
member.summary: Gets the CLR types that form the union.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeNames
member.summary: Contains well-known full type names used by Aspire hosting infrastructure.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeNames.AspireExportAttribute
member.summary: Full name of the AspireExportAttribute type.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeNames.AspireExportIgnoreAttribute
member.summary: Full name of the AspireExportIgnoreAttribute type.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeNames.AspireDtoAttribute
member.summary: Full name of the AspireDtoAttribute type.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeNames.AspireUnionAttribute
member.summary: Full name of the AspireUnionAttribute type.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeNames.ResourceInterface
member.summary: Full name of the IResource interface.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeNames.ResourceBuilderInterface
member.summary: Full name of the generic IResourceBuilder interface.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeNames.DistributedApplicationBuilder
member.summary: Full name of the IDistributedApplicationBuilder interface.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeNames.DistributedApplication
member.summary: Full name of the DistributedApplication class.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeNames.ReferenceExpression
member.summary: Full name of the ReferenceExpression class.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeNames.ReferenceExpressionBuilder
member.summary: Full name of the ReferenceExpressionBuilder class.

member.name: F:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeNames.ValueProviderInterface
member.summary: Full name of the IValueProvider interface.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeHelpers
member.summary: Provides helper methods for identifying well-known Aspire hosting types by full name.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeHelpers.IsResourceType(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified implements the IResource interface.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeHelpers.IsResourceBuilderType(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified implements the generic IResourceBuilder interface.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeHelpers.IsDistributedApplicationBuilderType(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified is the IDistributedApplicationBuilder interface.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.HostingTypeHelpers.IsDistributedApplicationType(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified is the DistributedApplication class.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.ICodeGenerator
member.summary: Interface for generating language-specific code from ATS capabilities.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.ICodeGenerator.Language
member.summary: Gets the target language name (e.g., "TypeScript", "Python").

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.ICodeGenerator.GenerateDistributedApplication(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsContext)
member.summary: Generates the distributed application SDK code from the ATS context.
member.param: The ATS context containing capabilities, types, and enums.
member.returns: A dictionary of file paths to file contents.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.ILanguageSupport
member.summary: Interface for providing language-specific support for polyglot AppHosts. Implementations provide scaffolding, detection, and runtime execution configuration.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.ILanguageSupport.Language
member.summary: Gets the language identifier (e.g., "TypeScript", "Python").

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.ILanguageSupport.Scaffold(Aspire.TypeSystem.ScaffoldRequest)
member.summary: Generates scaffold files for a new project.
member.param: The scaffold request containing project details.
member.returns: A dictionary of relative file paths to file contents.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.ILanguageSupport.Detect(System.String)
member.summary: Detects if a directory contains an AppHost for this language.
member.param: The directory to check.
member.returns: Detection result with language and file information.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.ILanguageSupport.GetRuntimeSpec
member.summary: Gets the runtime execution specification for this language.
member.returns: The runtime spec containing commands for execution.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.ScaffoldRequest
member.summary: Request for scaffolding a new AppHost project.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.ScaffoldRequest.TargetPath
member.summary: Gets the target directory path for the project.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.ScaffoldRequest.ProjectName
member.summary: Gets the project name. If null, derived from directory name.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.ScaffoldRequest.PortSeed
member.summary: Gets an optional seed for deterministic port generation (for testing).

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.DetectionResult
member.summary: Result of detecting an AppHost in a directory.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.DetectionResult.IsValid
member.summary: Gets whether a valid AppHost was detected.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.DetectionResult.Language
member.summary: Gets the detected language (e.g., "TypeScript").

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.DetectionResult.AppHostFile
member.summary: Gets the path to the detected AppHost file.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.DetectionResult.NotFound
member.summary: Creates a result indicating no AppHost was detected.

member.name: M:Aspire.TypeSystem.DetectionResult.Found(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a result indicating an AppHost was detected.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.RuntimeSpec
member.summary: Specifies the runtime execution configuration for a language.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.RuntimeSpec.Language
member.summary: Gets the language identifier (e.g., "TypeScript", "Python").

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.RuntimeSpec.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets the display name for the language (e.g., "TypeScript (Node.js)").

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.RuntimeSpec.CodeGenLanguage
member.summary: Gets the code generation language identifier for the generateCode RPC.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.RuntimeSpec.DetectionPatterns
member.summary: Gets the file patterns used to detect this language (e.g., ["apphost.ts"]).

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.RuntimeSpec.InstallDependencies
member.summary: Gets the command to install dependencies. Null if no dependencies to install.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.RuntimeSpec.Execute
member.summary: Gets the command to execute the AppHost for run.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.RuntimeSpec.WatchExecute
member.summary: Gets the command to execute the AppHost in watch mode. Null if watch mode not supported.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.RuntimeSpec.PublishExecute
member.summary: Gets the command to execute the AppHost for publish. Null to use Execute with args appended.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.RuntimeSpec.ExtensionLaunchCapability
member.summary: Gets the extension capability required to launch this language via the VS Code extension. When set (e.g., "node"), the CLI will use the extension launcher if the extension reports this capability. When null, the CLI always uses the default process-based launcher.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.RuntimeSpec.MigrationFiles
member.summary: Gets files that must exist in the project directory before execution. If a file in this dictionary is missing, the CLI will create it with the provided content. This supports upgrade scenarios where new runtime requirements are introduced.

member.name: T:Aspire.TypeSystem.CommandSpec
member.summary: Specifies a command to execute.

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.CommandSpec.Command
member.summary: Gets the command to execute (e.g., "npm", "npx", "python").

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.CommandSpec.Args
member.summary: Gets the arguments for the command. Supports placeholders: {appHostFile}, {appHostDir}, {args}

member.name: P:Aspire.TypeSystem.CommandSpec.EnvironmentVariables
member.summary: Gets the environment variables to set when executing the command. These are merged with any environment variables provided by the caller.
